other_observers: Janeal Thompson, Dotti Russell, Duane Nelson, Norma Verhoeff; Norma and Lance Verhoeff and their employee had spotted the owl when it was much closer to the road. By the time Norma had her camera the owl was more distant. She called the others to come observe.
specific_location: 1/2 mile south of Hwy 50 on County Road 26.5 on the west side of the road
description: -large white owl  -smallish round head  -some darker markings on top of head -face white -brownish horizontal barring across breastBehaviors: -sat still for the entire time we observed -seemed to be sleepyCall: was silentPlumage: adult
